report_name: Accenture Invests in AI-Powered Offensive Security Platform XBOW

tools.name: XBOW
tools.description: An autonomous cybersecurity testing platform powered by agentic AI, used for offensive security and exposure management. Accenture is integrating it into its Cyber.AI solution.

identities.name: Accenture
identities.description: A professional services firm that made a strategic investment in XBOW and is integrating the platform into its Cyber.AI managed security service offerings.

identities.name: XBOW
identities.description: A company that developed an autonomous cybersecurity testing platform powered by agentic AI. Received a strategic investment from Accenture.

identities.name: Accenture Ventures
identities.description: The venture capital arm of Accenture that made the strategic investment in XBOW.

identities.name: Accenture's Clients
identities.description: Enterprises that use Accenture's cybersecurity services and will benefit from the integration of XBOW's capabilities.
